race.comment: Absolute raffle to close the day. SHE MOVES TOO (16) was transferred to Queensland by Waller for her latest assignment which was an eye-catching second over 1350m at Ipswich where she was given an impossible task on the corner. Will enjoy getting to the open spaces of Eagle Farm and looks hard to beat in an open affair. Sparingly raced three-year-old FASVARA (10) made it two-for-two this prep when he easily took out a BM65 over 1300m at the Gold Coast recently. Maps nicely just off the speed from a favourable barrier. Open to further progress so keep him very safe. SOME STYLE (14) just ran out of condition here last start when she led for home. Has raced five times at this trip for a win and four placings. Likely leader who should be peaking now and will be a tough lure to catch. Big market watch on NAVY NINA (13) who has gone from the Hayes stable to Tony Gollan and has been freshened. Victorian form is certainly up to scratch. SENESCHAL (2) can improve back in grade third-up.
